title: About
seo_title: About Austin — Denver Front-End Developer & AI Technical Partner
seo_description: Austin Schuetz is a Denver front-end developer turned full-stack product engineer and AI technical partner. Ten years of shipping, still going.

blocks.heading: I started with WordPress. I didn't stop there.
blocks.lede_md: Ten years ago I was a freelance front-end developer building sites for Denver businesses. Since then I've done agency work, studio work, and in-house engineering — and spent my nights building products from scratch. The through-line: I ship.

items.caption: AUSTIN SCHUETZ — DENVER, CO · WORKING WITH TEAMS IN EVERY TIMEZONE

blocks.body_md:
I'm a developer based in **Denver, Colorado**. I started freelance in 2015, hand-building WordPress sites for local businesses — gyms, glassblowers, illustrators, whoever needed a site that worked.

That led to a run of roles that each stretched the craft a little further: front-end and platform work at Sphera, custom theme development through Studio Science for Integrate, then a marketing agency, and now engineering at Sequoia. Somewhere in there the work stopped being *just* websites and became products — full-stack, cross-platform, and increasingly built with AI in the loop.

The products on this site are mostly nights-and-weekends work: a live trading system, a gym platform, a couple of consumer apps, and the CMS you're reading this on. That's where I test what's possible before I bring it to client work. On the weekends that aren't that, I'm on a trail somewhere in the Front Range.

items.title: Freelance front-end developer
items.body_md: Hand-built WordPress and front-end sites for local businesses. Gyms, small brands, personal sites. This is where the archive starts.

items.title: Front-end & platform
items.body_md: Moved from lone freelancer to team work on larger web platforms and marketing sites.

items.title: Theme development
items.body_md: Authored a custom WordPress theme and a stack of page templates with gulp/Sass and ACF. Real production front-end at scale.

items.title: Web developer
items.body_md: Agency work — web design and development, SEO, and lead-gen builds for a roster of clients.

items.title: Software engineer
items.body_md: In-house engineering by day. By night, building products end-to-end and going deep on AI — multi-agent systems and Claude API integrations.

blocks.body_md:
## Now
I'm at Sequoia during the week, and I keep a light freelance and partnership load outside of it.

I'm available for **freelance front-end and WordPress builds**, **full-stack product engineering**, and — the part I'm most interested in right now — **AI integration partnerships** for startups. If you're a founder who needs someone to actually build the AI, not just talk about it, that's the work I want. I've shipped production systems on the Claude API and I know where the sharp edges are.

blocks.heading: Let's work together.
blocks.body_md: Freelance build, product engineering, or an AI partnership — I'd like to hear about it.
